inheritance_remediation_spec.title: Inheritance Manager Remediation Spec
inheritance_remediation_spec.instruction_raw: Based on the FAILED PR review (pr_review_fix-economic-leaks-atomicity-1241896888021299611.md), draft a new MISSION_SPEC that addresses the atomicity fixes and Penny/Int conversion WITHOUT polluting production code with MagicMock or TEST_MODE checks. Focus on fixing the tests (verify_inheritance.py) to use proper DTO/Agent specs instead of lazy mocks.

test_analysis_finance.title: Module Audit: Finance (Test Speed & Errors)
test_analysis_finance.instruction_raw: Analyze all tests in 'tests/unit/modules/finance' and 'tests/finance'. Identify any failing tests, errors, or significant performance bottlenecks (slow setup/cleanup). Investigate the root cause (e.g., SSoT mismatches, Mock leaks).

test_analysis_firm.title: Module Audit: Firm (Test Speed & Errors)
test_analysis_firm.instruction_raw: Analyze all tests in 'tests/unit/modules/firm' and 'tests/simulation/test_firms.py'. Identify any failing tests, errors, or significant performance bottlenecks (slow setup/cleanup). Investigate the root cause (e.g., capital injection race conditions).
